title: Savory Peruvian Onion Stir-fry
description: A light and diabetic-friendly peruvian dish featuring crispy onion rings infused with savory spices for a show-off side or appetizer.
instructions: Slice onion into rings and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle half of olive oil over onions, toss gently, then drizzle remaining oil. Season with salt and pepper.
Bake for about 15 minutes until slightly golden brown.
Meanwhile, cook turkey bacon in another pan until crispy.
Mix ginger paste into the cooked onions to create a thick sauce. Stir-fry onion rings in the same pan used for bacon, adding them last to avoid overcooking.
Serve hot with green onions garnished on top.
